division_title: SENTENCING FOR DRIVING WHILE UNDER THE INFLUENCE
text: The Office of Traffic Safety shall adopt rules and guidelines to implement Sections 23646 to 23649, inclusive.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11.5. SENTENCING FOR DRIVING WHILE UNDER THE INFLUENCE [23500 - 23675]
### Chapter 4. Procedures [23610 - 23675]
#### Article 6. Alcohol Assessment [23645 - 23650]
##### § 23650

The Office of Traffic Safety shall adopt rules and guidelines to implement Sections 23646 to 23649, inclusive.

*(Amended by Stats. 1999, Ch. 22, Sec. 43. Effective May 26, 1999. Operative July 1, 1999, by Sec. 46 of Ch. 22.)*

subsections.text: The Office of Traffic Safety shall adopt rules and guidelines to implement Sections 23646 to 23649, inclusive.
